info.title: Zayna Store
info.description: Zayna Store API for our new Store

get.description: Returns a paginated list of active products with main image only. Supports filtering by category and text search. No authentication required.

200.description: List of products retrieved successfully with pagination info

get.description: Returns full product details including all images and category information. Only returns active products. No authentication required.
Returns a minimal list of all categories (ID and name only) for public browsing. No authentication required.

get.summary: Retrieves all orders for authenticated user
get.description: Returns a list of all orders placed by the authenticated user. Only shows orders belonging to the current user.

post.description: Creates a new order for the authenticated user. Validates product availability, applies coupon discount if provided, and calculates total amount. Accessible by both customers and admins.

400.description: Invalid request - missing items, insufficient stock, invalid products, or invalid coupon

get.description: Returns full order details including order items. Users can only access their own orders.

403.description: Forbidden - you can only access your own orders

post.description: Checks if a coupon code is valid for the authenticated user and calculates the discount amount. Returns validation status, discount details, and final order total.

post.summary: Authenticates a user and returns JWT tokens
post.description: Validates user credentials and returns an access token (30 minutes) and refresh token (15 days) along with user information and roles. Publicly accessible.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token and refresh token. The old refresh token is revoked (single-use). Publicly accessible.

200.description: Token refreshed successfully, new tokens returned

post.summary: Creates a new customer user account
post.description: Creates a new customer user with the provided details and assigns the Customer role. Only accessible by administrators.

get.description: Returns a list of all users with the Customer role. Only accessible by administrators.

delete.description: Marks a customer user as deleted without permanently removing the record. Only accessible by administrators.

400.description: Invalid request or user is not a customer

get.summary: Retrieves a customer user by ID
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific customer user. Only accessible by administrators.

put.description: Updates the details of a customer user account. Only accessible by administrators.

post.summary: Creates a new administrator user account
post.description: Creates a new user with the provided details and assigns the Admin role. Only accessible by existing administrators.

get.description: Returns a list of all users with the Admin role. Only accessible by administrators.

delete.description: Marks an administrator user as deleted without permanently removing the record. Only accessible by administrators.

400.description: Invalid request or user is not an admin

get.summary: Retrieves an administrator user by ID
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific administrator user. Only accessible by administrators.

put.description: Updates the details of an administrator user account. Only accessible by administrators.

post.summary: Adds an image to a product
post.description: Adds a new image to an existing product. If marked as main, automatically unsets other main images. Only accessible by administrators.

post.summary: Creates a new product with images
post.description: Creates a new product with multiple images. At least one image is required and exactly one must be marked as main. Only accessible by administrators.

400.description: Invalid request, validation errors, or category not found

get.description: Returns a list of all products with full details including all images and category information. Only accessible by administrators.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a product and all associated images. Only accessible by administrators.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific product including all images and category. Only accessible by administrators.

put.description: Updates product details (name, description, price, stock, category, active status). Images are managed separately via image endpoints. Only accessible by administrators.

400.description: Invalid request, validation errors, or category not found

delete.description: Removes an image from a product. Cannot delete the last remaining image. If deleting the main image, automatically promotes another image to main. Only accessible by administrators.

400.description: Cannot delete the only remaining image

put.summary: Sets an image as the main product image
put.description: Marks a specific image as the main product image. Automatically unsets other main images for the same product. Only accessible by administrators.

get.description: Returns a list of all orders with customer information and order details. Only accessible by administrators.
Returns full order details including customer information and order items. Only accessible by administrators.

put.description: Changes the status of an order. Automatically sets ShippedDate when status is Shipped and DeliveredDate when status is Delivered. Only accessible by administrators.

post.description: Creates a new discount coupon with validation rules and usage limits. Code must be unique and contain only uppercase letters and numbers. Only accessible by administrators.

400.description: Invalid request, validation errors, or coupon code already exists

get.description: Returns a list of all discount coupons with usage statistics. Only accessible by administrators.

put.description: Marks a coupon as inactive, preventing it from being used. Only accessible by administrators.
Marks a coupon as active, allowing it to be used if other conditions are met. Only accessible by administrators.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific coupon including usage statistics. Only accessible by administrators.

put.description: Updates coupon details. Coupon code cannot be changed after creation. Only accessible by administrators.

post.description: Creates a new category for organizing products. Only accessible by administrators.

get.description: Returns a list of all categories with product counts. Only accessible by administrators.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a category if it has no associated products. Only accessible by administrators.

400.description: Category has associated products and cannot be deleted

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific category including product count. Only accessible by administrators.

put.description: Updates the details of a product category. Only accessible by administrators.

ProblemDetails.description:
RFC7807 compatible problem details/ error response class. this can be used by configuring startup like so:
app.UseFastEndpoints(c => c.Errors.UseProblemDetails())

title.default: One or more validation errors occurred.

name.description: the name of the error or property of the dto that caused the error

JWTBearerAuth.description: Enter a JWT token to authorize the requests...
